mapper.sql: id, config_key, config_name, config_value, config_type, description, status, TO_CHAR(create_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createTime
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_config_info WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0
SELECT FROM sys_config_info WHERE config_key = #{configKey} AND delete_flag = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM sys_config_info WHERE status = 1 AND delete_flag = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_config_info SET config_name = #{configName}, config_value = #{configValue}, config_type = #{configType}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
